---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Codebeacon
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Example: "It's hard to do X because..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about the behaviour and how it helps.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds or alternative designs you've thought about.

## Context

- Language(s) affected: [e.g. Rust, TypeScript, Go, Python, C#]
- Use case: [e.g. monorepo with 10k files, CI pipeline, local model]
